--- Begin [Pasted text #7 · 164 lines] ---
明白，既然 ClassAppTheme 内部已经接管了字符串到布尔值的类型转换，那 MainActivity 确实完全没有问题。针对彻底移除 ScheduleApp 颜色缓存大对象并重构 TodayScreen 原地直算的实际需求，以下是精简完备的重构实现方案。1. 清理后的 ScheduleApp.kt 路由配置在 ScheduleApp.kt 中，确保去除了顶层所有关于 courseColorPalette、courseColorMap、examColorMap 的缓存块 ，保持 NavHost 传参的绝对纯净：  Kotlin// ScheduleApp.kt 内部的 NavHost 路由配置NavHost(    navController = navController,    startDestination = Screen.Today.route,    modifier = Modifier.padding(if (showBottomBar) innerPadding else PaddingValues(0.dp))) {    composable(Screen.Today.route) {        TodayScreen(            courses = courses,             currentWeek = realCurrentWeek,            colorEngine = colorEngine,             colorGroupMode = colorGroupMode,            exams = examList,            showExamSchedule = showExamSchedule,            examLookaheadWeeks = examLookaheadWeeks,            semesterStart = semesterStart,            getStartTime = { viewModel.getStartTime(it) },            getEndTime = { viewModel.getEndTime(it) },            onCourseLongPress = { navController.navigate(Screen.CourseEdit.createRoute(it.id)) }            // ✂️ 干净利落，已彻底切除所有全局颜色 Map 相关的透传参数        )    }    // ... WeeklyScheduleScreen / CourseManageScreen 等其他路由保持原样}2. 重构后的 TodayScreen.kt 核心实现模式由于 TodayScreen.kt 需要在没有外部色盘注入的情况下独立运行，我们需要在内部直接调用 CourseColors.getColorSync 。针对 Mode 1（同课不同饱和度阶梯），我们需要在过滤出来的今日课程列表中，动态生成教室的相对序号。  以下是适配 HCT 动态色彩引擎的原地直算架构设计：Kotlinpackage com.classapp.schedule.ui.todayimport androidx.compose.foundation.backgroundimport androidx.compose.foundation.clickableimport androidx.compose.foundation.layout.*import androidx.compose.foundation.lazy.LazyColumnimport androidx.compose.foundation.lazy.itemsimport androidx.compose.foundation.shape.CircleShapeimport androidx.compose.material3.*import androidx.compose.runtime.*import androidx.compose.ui.Alignmentimport androidx.compose.ui.Modifierimport androidx.compose.ui.draw.clipimport androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontWeightimport androidx.compose.ui.unit.dpimport com.classapp.schedule.data.Courseimport com.classapp.schedule.api.ExamInfoimport com.classapp.schedule.util.CourseColorsimport com.classapp.schedule.ui.theme.LocalAppIsDarkimport java.time.LocalDate@Composablefun TodayScreen(    courses: List<Course>,    currentWeek: Int,    colorEngine: Int,    colorGroupMode: Int,    exams: List<ExamInfo>,    showExamSchedule: Boolean,    examLookaheadWeeks: Int,    semesterStart: LocalDate,    getStartTime: (Int) -> String,    getEndTime: (Int) -> String,    onCourseLongPress: (Course) -> Unit) {    val isDark = LocalAppIsDark.current    val todayOfWeek = LocalDate.now().dayOfWeek.value // 1..7    // 1. 过滤出本周今天的课程    val todayCourses = remember(courses, currentWeek, todayOfWeek) {        courses.filter { it.isInWeek(currentWeek) && it.dayOfWeek == todayOfWeek }            .sortedBy { it.startPeriod }    }    // 2. 为 Mode 1 建立今日局部的教室映射计数器，确保同课名不同地点的 classIdx 正确递增    val classroomCounters = remember(todayCourses) {        val counters = mutableMapOf<String, Int>()        todayCourses.map { course ->            val idx = counters.getOrPut(course.name) { 0 }            counters[course.name] = idx + 1            course.id to idx        }.toMap()    }    LazyColumn(        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(),        contentPadding = PaddingValues(16.dp),        verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(12.dp)    ) {        // 今日课程列表区域        items(todayCourses) { course ->            val classIdx = classroomCounters[course.id] ?: 0                        // 🎯 原地现场直算 HCT 容器色与内容色对            val courseColor = remember(course, colorGroupMode, isDark) {                CourseColors.getColorSync(                    mode = colorGroupMode,                    courseName = course.name,                    classroom = course.classroom,                    classroomIndex = classIdx,                    isDark = isDark                )            }            TodayCourseCard(                course = course,                containerColor = courseColor.container,                contentColor = courseColor.content,                onLongPress = { onCourseLongPress(course) }            )        }        // 考试安排轮询区域 (Lookahead Exam)        if (showExamSchedule) {            // 过滤未达考试并按时间排序...            items(exams) { exam ->                // 🎯 考试项目统一不参与 Mode 1 递减，classroomIndex 传 0                val examColor = remember(exam, colorGroupMode, isDark) {                    CourseColors.getColorSync(                        mode = colorGroupMode,                        courseName = exam.kcmc,                        classroom = exam.cdmc,                        classroomIndex = 0,                        isDark = isDark                    )                }                TodayExamCard(                    exam = exam,                    indicatorColor = examColor.content // 竖杠使用无障碍高对比度内容色                )            }        }    }}@Composableprivate fun TodayCourseCard(    course: Course,    containerColor: androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color,    contentColor: androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color,    onLongPress: () -> Unit) {    Card(        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),        shape = MaterialTheme.shapes.medium,        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = containerColor)    ) {        Row(            modifier = Modifier.padding(14.dp).height(IntrinsicSize.Min),            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically        ) {            // 左侧高对比度进度线/状态指示线            Box(                modifier = Modifier                    .width(4.dp)                    .fillMaxHeight()                    .clip(CircleShape)                    .background(contentColor)            )            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(14.dp))            Column {                Text(text = course.name, style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium, color = contentColor, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold)                Text(text = course.classroom, style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium, color = contentColor.copy(alpha = 0.8f))            }        }    }}📈 重构后的收益内存优化：ScheduleApp 卸下了大容量状态快照的包袱，消除了频繁进出页面时哈希重算和局部 GC 带来的微小顿卡现象。幂等一致性：由于课表页（WeeklyScheduleScreen）与今日页（TodayScreen）共享同一套无状态的算法输入源（课程名与教室空间组合），两边只要路由切换，颜色即可实现 100% 绝对物理同步。
--- End [Pasted text #7 · 164 lines] ---
